summary: End-to-end testing of CrateMindAI Phase A+B: runtime preflight endpoint, backend API contract with fixture library (310 tracks), Home command-center page, sidebar navigation, legacy route redirects, mobile drawer & Escape close, and safety (GET-only during page loads). Everything passes.
critical_code_review_comments: React Router v6 future-flag warnings printed to console (v7_startTransition, v7_relativeSplatPath). Non-blocking but easy fix by adding the future flags to <BrowserRouter/>.
Vite HMR websocket errors seen on preview proxy — expected in this env and safe to ignore, but consider `hmr: false` for the deployed preview to silence console noise.

backend preflight response includes env var *names* (SPOTIFY_CLIENT_ID, SPOTIFY_CLIENT_SECRET, OLLAMA_BASE_URL) in remediation strings. That is fine (names only, no values), but note if secret-scanner tools flag the word 'SECRET'.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (home, nav x7, redirects x7, sidebar collapse, mobile drawer + Escape, legacy pages load)

test_credentials: N/A — trusted-local-only, no auth by design
seed_data_creation: None — used existing /app/fixture_library (310 tracks) as instructed
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest lives at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py and validates preflight (ready), health, stats (310/10/8), tracks (total=310), metadata-repair summary (queue_total>0), enrichment queue (total=24), library overview, jobs. Frontend testids observed working: home-page, next-action-banner, next-action-cta, metric-total-tracks/missing-files/untracked-files, readiness-panel, topbar-readiness-pill='System ready', recent-jobs-empty, attention-cards + attention-{repair,enrichment,missing-files,untracked-files}, app-sidebar, sidebar-collapse-button (toggles .cm-shell--collapsed), nav-{tracks,quality,metadata-repair,jobs,export,ssd-sync,reconciliation}, open-nav-drawer-button (only at 768px), mobile-nav-drawer, drawer-nav-metadata-repair (closes drawer after nav), Escape closes drawer. Redirects verified: /dashboard→/, /collection→/library, /tracks→/library, /settings→/, /export→/exports, /ssd-sync→/sync, unknown→/. Backend access log confirms only GET requests during page loads — safety preserved. Cloudflare occasionally rate-limits (HTTP 429) if browser tests hammer the URL; add ~1s waits between navigations.
